name: Talisman of the Sphere
description: While holding or wearing this talisman, you have Advantage on any Intelligence (Arcana) check you make to control a Sphere of Annihilation.

sphere_control.advantage: Advantage on Intelligence (Arcana) checks to control Sphere of Annihilation

enhanced_movement.trigger: Start your turn in control of Sphere of Annihilation
enhanced_movement.movement: 10 feet plus 10 feet per point of Intelligence modifier
enhanced_movement.direction: Doesn't have to be in straight line
